name: Lammar Wright, Jr.
abstract: Lammar Wright Jr. (September 26, 1924 – July 8, 1983) was an American jazz trumpeter.

about_quotes.speaker: Terry Clark
about_quotes.evidence: I remember the band – some of the personnel of the band we had in the Strand. People like Leon Comegys, Lammar Wright, Jr., Lucky Thompson, just to name a few.
about_quotes.doc_title: Terry Clark — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Joe Wilder
about_quotes.evidence: Dave Burns was in the trumpet section, Lammar Wright, Jr., Ike – I can’t think of his last name.
about_quotes.doc_title: Joe Wilder — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
